# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of **wptechnix/di-container** seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please follow responsible disclosure practices.

**Do not** open a public issue. Instead, send a private report via one of the following methods:

- **GitHub Security Advisory**: Use the ["Report a Vulnerability"](https://github.com/wptechnix/di-container/security/advisories/new) tab on this repository.
- **Email**: Contact the maintainers directly via the contact information available on the [WPTechnix GitHub profile](https://github.com/wptechnix).

We aim to acknowledge reports within **72 hours** and will work with you to understand the scope and severity of the issue.

## Supported Versions

Only the **latest stable release** of this library receives security patches. Older versions are not actively maintained.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Latest release | ✅ |
| Older releases | ❌ |

## Disclosure Policy

When a vulnerability is reported and confirmed:

1. We will investigate and develop a fix.
2. A security release will be published as soon as possible.
3. The vulnerability will be publicly disclosed after the fix is released, with credit to the reporter (if desired).

Thank you for helping keep this project and its users safe.
